messages.content: 翻译 这是我用相机拍摄的3D场景的图，以相机此刻的位置为原点建立一个3D空间坐标系。该图片向右为x轴，向上方向为y轴，镜头向前方向为z轴。让相机运动，沿z方向向前移动a个单位，沿该x方向移动b个单位，再沿y方向移动c个单位。随后相机绕y轴向右旋转m度，绕x轴向上旋转n度，相机平面绕z轴自转k度。此时相机大概在图中标记1的地方。生成相机在新位置朝向拍到的该3D场景的图片。

# Translation

This is an image of a 3D scene captured by my camera. Establish a 3D spatial coordinate system with the camera's current position as the origin. In this image, the right direction is the x-axis, the upward direction is the y-axis, and the forward direction through the lens is the z-axis. Move the camera forward along the z-direction by 'a' units, move along the x-direction by 'b' units, then move along the y-direction by 'c' units. Subsequently, rotate the camera 'm' degrees to the right around the y-axis, rotate 'n' degrees upward around the x-axis, and rotate the camera plane 'k' degrees around the z-axis (roll). At this point, the camera is approximately at the location marked as "1" in the image. Generate an image of this 3D scene as captured by the camera at its new position and orientation.

---

**Summary**: This describes a camera transformation task in 3D space involving translation (along x, y, z axes) followed by rotation (yaw around y-axis, pitch around x-axis, and roll around z-axis) to generate a novel view of the scene from a new viewpoint marked as position "1".
